message:
feat(gateway): Add /health/detailed endpoint for comprehensive system health

Implements comprehensive system health check endpoint that monitors:
- Database connectivity and latency
- DCG, CASS, UBS CLI availability with timeout handling
- Agent driver registry health
- WebSocket hub statistics
- Agent CLI auto-detection results

Features:
- Parallel health checks with individual 5s timeouts
- 10-second response caching for performance
- HTTP 200/503 based on aggregated status
- Critical failure detection (database, drivers)
- Summary with pass/degraded/failed counts

Tests are skipped by default (RUN_SLOW_TESTS=1 to enable) as CLI
auth checks can take 30-60+ seconds.

Closes: flywheel_gateway-4ix

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
